Reference

§ 01Qualification Criteria

Each criterion is scored on a 0-2 scale: 0 = Does not meet / Disqualifying, 1 = Partially meets / Concern, 2 = Fully meets / No issues. The total score is compared against the threshold to determine the recommendation.

#
Criterion
Score
Status
01
EBITDA threshold — Trailing 12-month EBITDA meets or exceeds $1,000,000
{{criteriaEbitda}}
{{criteriaEbitdaStatus}}
02
Revenue stability — Revenue has been stable or growing over the past 3 years
{{criteriaRevenue}}
{{criteriaRevenueStatus}}
03
C-Corp eligibility — Entity is already a C-Corp or can be converted before closing
{{criteriaCorp}}
{{criteriaCorpStatus}}
04
Employee count — Sufficient employees for ESOP participation (minimum ~15 eligible)
{{criteriaEmployees}}
{{criteriaEmployeesStatus}}
05
Management depth — Management team can operate independently of the seller
{{criteriaMgmt}}
{{criteriaMgmtStatus}}
06
Industry fit — Service, professional services, manufacturing, or distribution (not restricted sector)
{{criteriaIndustry}}
{{criteriaIndustryStatus}}
07
Debt capacity — Cash flow supports senior financing and seller note for ESOP purchase
{{criteriaDebt}}
{{criteriaDebtStatus}}
08
Seller motivation — Seller is motivated and has realistic valuation expectations
{{criteriaSeller}}
{{criteriaSellerStatus}}
09
Customer concentration — No single customer exceeds 20% of revenue (or manageable risk)
{{criteriaConcentration}}
{{criteriaConcentrationStatus}}
10
Clean legal — No material pending litigation, regulatory issues, or unresolved liens
{{criteriaLegal}}
{{criteriaLegalStatus}}
Total Score
{{totalScore}} / 20
{{totalStatus}}
{{threshold}} / 20
§ 02Scoring Key
2Fully meets. No issues or concerns. Criterion is satisfied without qualification.
1Partially meets. Concern exists but can likely be addressed during diligence or structuring. Not disqualifying on its own.
0Does not meet. Disqualifying concern. Criterion cannot be reasonably overcome. Requires extenuating circumstances to proceed.
§ 03Recommendation
Recommendation: {{recommendation}}
